summary: The diff shows changes to authentication components (AuthButton, useAuth hook) and backend (main.mo), but no changes related to account creation functionality. The BuildRequest specifically requires investigation and fixing of an unresponsive account creation button with name/email form fields, but the diff only contains login/logout authentication flow modifications. There is no evidence of any account creation/signup button, form, or mutation implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Investigate and identify why the account creation button does not respond when clicked, checking for event handler attachment, form validation errors, missing mutation calls, console errors, and any blocking conditions
missing_requirements.reason: No investigation or debugging of an account creation button is present in the diff. The only button-related changes are to the AuthButton component which handles login/logout, not account creation. There is no evidence of examining an account creation form or signup button.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the identified issue causing the account creation button to be unresponsive, ensuring signup process executes with appropriate user feedback
missing_requirements.reason: No account creation/signup functionality is implemented or fixed in the diff. The changes only address login/logout flows. There is no signup mutation, no account creation form with name/email fields, no loading states for signup, and no success/error feedback for account creation.

hallucinated_features.description: Enhanced login/logout authentication flow with error handling, loading toasts, timeout protection, and automatic cleanup
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifically focuses on fixing an account creation button, not improving the existing login/logout authentication flow. These enhancements to login/logout functionality were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Console logging for debugging button click events in AuthButton
hallucinated_features.reason: While debugging was mentioned in REQ-28, it was specifically for the account creation button, not the login button. The logging added is for the wrong button.
